# MakerLens

> Free, browser-based RPG Maker asset viewer and extractor. Runs 100% offline — no server, no uploads.

## What it does

MakerLens lets you open encrypted RPG Maker game files directly in your browser and preview or download the images and audio inside.

- **RPG Maker MV / MZ**: open the game folder; the encryption key is auto-read from `data/System.json`. Supports `.rpgmvp`, `.png_` (images) and `.rpgmvo`, `.rpgmvm`, `.ogg_`, `.m4a_` (audio).
- **RPG Maker XP / VX / VX Ace**: open a `.rgssad`, `.rgss2a`, or `.rgss3a` archive directly. No key needed — it's embedded in the archive.

## Key features

- Zero install — open `index.html` in any modern browser
- Auto key detection from `System.json`
- Audio preview with duration display
- Lightbox image viewer with keyboard navigation
- Download individual files or export whole folders as ZIP
- Drag-and-drop support
- Light/dark theme

## Privacy

All processing happens inside your browser. No files or keys are ever uploaded or sent to any server.

## Supported formats

`.rpgmvp`, `.png_`, `.rpgmvo`, `.rpgmvm`, `.ogg_`, `.m4a_`, `.rgssad`, `.rgss2a`, `.rgss3a`, `.png`, `.jpg`, `.gif`, `.webp`, `.bmp`, `.ogg`, `.m4a`

## Source

https://github.com/Kokoroou/rpgmaker-assets-viewer
